content.full_text:
December 2, 2009

Jim Burns
Noyo Harbor Commission
26250 Omar Dr.
Fort Bragg, CA 95437

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-09-239

Dear Mr. Burns:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn your request for advice after unsuccessfully attempting to contact you, at the phone number you have provided, for additional information necessary to issue advice. Messages were left at the number provided on both November 17, 2009, and November 24, 2009.

Should you still need assistance, you will need to resubmit your request. If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Brian G. Lau
Counsel, Legal Division
